prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约19482→28552→25516→30156→43519，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约18000名，2025年较2024年后移约13363名，后移幅度显 著扩大；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021年43人、2022年35人、2023年34人、2024年48人、2025年71人，近年扩招明显；2026年计划80人，较2025年增 加9人，扩幅约12.7%，为近年最大扩招幅度，对竞争有明显缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 辽宁大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第125名，近年排名稳定 在124–131区间，属中游211层次；声誉文件中无辽宁大学相关负面或正面舆情记录；抖音学校热度总排名第105位，评价为「一般」，综合热度约5.9万，短视频 曝光量处于211院校中下游水平，未见明显报考关注升温信号；历史投档异常记录中亦无该校；第五轮学科评估中，辽宁大学唯一A-及以上学科为应用经济学（A -），与物理类招生的经济学类、金融学类、财政学、经济统计学、数字经济等专业直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、 电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度均为「高热推荐」或「推荐」，对物理类考生吸引力强；湖南省物理类考生2021年205920人→2025年320192人→2026年347000人，2026年较2025 年增加约8.4%，竞争持续加剧，近年呈下降趋势；辽宁大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，与湖南省跨省距离较远；该校在湖南 省招生占比约2%–3%，属外省普通招生规模，无明显地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招12.7%（缓解竞争）、湖南省物理类考 生增加8.4%（加剧竞争）、以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业高热度吸引报考等因素，扩招的缓解作用略大于考生增加的加剧作用，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准43519名 基础上略有前移；预测最低位次约46628名，区间46128–47128名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 19482 → 28552 → 25516 → 30156 → 43519, showing a continuous backward trend overall. In the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift was about 18,000 places, and in 2025 compared to 2024, the backward shift was about 13,363 places, with a significantly expanded magnitude. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for Physics Category was 43 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 71 in 2025, showing obvious expansion in recent years. The 2026 plan is 80 students, an increase of 9 students compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 12.7%, the largest expansion rate in recent years, which has a significant alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranked 125th, with a stable ranking in the 124–131 range in recent years, belonging to the mid-tier 211 level. There are no negative or positive public opinion records related to Liaoning University in the reputation file. The overall Douyin school popularity ranking is 105th, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 59,000, and short video exposure is at the lower-middle level among 211 universities, with no obvious signs of increased application attention. There are also no historical abnormal admission records for this university. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Liaoning University's only A- or above discipline is Applied Economics (A-), which directly corresponds to majors such as Economics, Finance, Public Finance, Economic Statistics, and Digital Economy in the Physics Category enrollment, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have social popularity ratings of 'highly recommended' or 'recommended', which are attractive to Physics Category candidates. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province was 205,920 in 2021 → 320,192 in 2025 → 347,000 in 2026, with an increase of about 8.4% in 2026 compared to 2025, indicating continuously intensifying competition, with a downward trend in recent years. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang City, Liaoning Province, which is far from Hunan Province across provinces. The university's enrollment proportion in Hunan Province is about 2%–3%, which is a normal enrollment scale for out-of-province universities, with no obvious regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by 12.7% (alleviating competition), the increase of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province by 8.4% (intensifying competition), and the high popularity of hot majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information attracting applications, the alleviating effect of expansion slightly outweighs the intensifying effect of candidate increase. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward based on the 2025 baseline of 43,519. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 46,628, with a range of 46,128–47,128.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 46,628, with a range of 46,128–47,128. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (46,128) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Microelectronics, and Electrical Engineering. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 46,628) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors, prioritizing Applied Economics A- related majors such as Economic Statistics and Digital Economy. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (47,128) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, prioritizing economics and management majors such as Economics and Public Finance.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4361 → 16245 → 6064 → 5877 → 6669. In 2022, there was an abnormal large drop, but it quickly stabilized. In the past three years, it has fluctuated narrowly within the 5877–6669 range, with a 2025 baseline of about 6669. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for History Category was 44 in 2021, 36 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 47 in 2024, and 49 in 2025, showing a gradual annual increase. The 2026 plan is 50, an increase of 1 person from 2025, an expansion of about 2%, which has limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranked 125th, with a stable ranking in the 124–131 range in recent years, placing it in the mid-tier 211 level. There are no negative or positive public opinion records related to Liaoning University in the reputation file. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranking is 105th, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 59,000. Short video exposure is at the lower-middle level among 211 universities, with no obvious signs of increased application attention. There are also no abnormal admission records for this university. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Liaoning University's only A- or above discipline is Applied Economics (A-), which directly corresponds to its enrollment majors such as Finance, Economics, International Economics and Trade, and Public Finance, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Finance/Economics/Economic majors is in a state of 'differentiated wait-and-see', while Accounting/Finance/Audit is 'recommended', Chinese Language and Literature is 'recommended', and Journalism and Communication is 'clearly discouraged'. The number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province was 165,702 in 2021 → 142,547 in 2025 → 187,000 in 2026. In 2026, it increased significantly by about 31% compared to 2025, intensifying competition, with a slight decline in recent years. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, which is far from Hunan Province. The university's enrollment proportion in Hunan is about 2%–3% (in 2024, 19 students were enrolled in Hunan, accounting for 2.5% of the national total), which is a normal out-of-province enrollment scale, with no obvious regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the historical rankings have been stable in the 5877–6669 range in the past three years, the 2026 enrollment plan only expands by 1 person (+2%), the number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province increases significantly by 31% intensifying competition, and factors such as average university reputation, low Douyin popularity, and limited cross-provincial regional appeal, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly drop from the 2025 baseline of 6669. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6771, with a range of 6271–7271.
